content: I don't even know what's wrong

It sounds like you're feeling really confused. That’s completely okay; it can be tough to navigate those feelings. It might help to take a moment to breathe deeply and just focus on what you’re experiencing right now. 

You could try jotting down any thoughts or feelings that come to mind, even if they seem jumbled. Alternatively, if you want to talk more about what’s bothering you, I’m here to listen.
